arts.ttl: James Maddison: “That’s what we want to showcase - it was all there”
arts.sum: “I’ve just said in a few interviews that these days don’t come around very often, against the champions, arguably the best team in Europe, Pep Guardiola’s side, so you have to enjoy them. I said to the boys, ‘it’s not often you’ll come to the champions and win 4-0’, so enjoy it.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot backs up Pep Guardiola opinion ahead of Liverpool's trip to Southampton
arts.sum: Arne Slot has joined Pep Guardiola in voicing his admiration for Southampton manager Russell Martin for sticking steadfastly to his principles despite results

arts.ttl: Man Utd and Man City keen on Gyokeres - Sunday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester United and Manchester City to compete for Sporting's Viktor Gyokeres, Crystal Palace's Adam Wharton a target for Manchester City, Aston Villa among clubs keen on Manchester United's Joshua Zirkzee, plus more.

arts.ttl: Five losses in a row: Are Manchester City officially in crisis?
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola's Manchester City suffer their fifth straight loss in all competitions, which poses another question: are they in crisis mode?

arts.ttl: Man Utd ready to take on Man City for Viktor Gyokeres transfer after Ruben Amorim plea
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim wants to add firepower to his Manchester United squad - and is targeting a move for Viktor Gyokeres after working with the striker to great effect at Sporting

arts.ttl: Man City confident they will WIN legal battle as Pep Guardiola given fresh assurances
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola signed a new contract to remain as Manchester City manager earlier this week - with the Premier League champions increasingly confident they will win their legal battle
